  "findings": [
    "Arc-flash PPE staged for the task has an arc rating below the required category specified on the equipment label."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately before any electrical exposure occurs.",
    "Remove the non-compliant PPE from the staging area.",
    "Procure and verify PPE that meets or exceeds the arc-flash hazard category specified on the equipment label."
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged PPE does not match the required arc-flash hazard category indicated on the equipment label. Using under-rated PPE during energized electrical work poses a critical risk of severe burn injury or death in the event of an arc-flash incident.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 70E Article 130",
    "OSHA 1910.335(a)(1)(i)"
  ]
